title: Silence 2: The Night Owl Bar Shootout
original_title: Silence 2: The Night Owl Bar Shootout
overview: Follows ACP Avinash Verma as he investigates the killing of a minister's assistant in a mass shootout. As his team delves deeper into the case, a darker conspiracy is revealed.
